# Data on Disability Among the Total Population

**KFF State Health Facts — Health Status**

Home › State Health Facts › Health Status

Canonical page: https://www.kff.org/state-category/health-status/disability-among-total-population/

## Health Status

This category provides information on the health of the population in each state. It includes data on births, deaths, immunizations, obesity, smoking, and various illnesses and diseases, including influenza, cancer, diabetes, and heart disease. Data and information related to mental health and substance use disorder can be found in the Mental Health & Substance Use category; data and information on HIV/AIDS can be found in the HIV/AIDS category.

Select an indicator below to view state data. Results will be shown as a table, map, or trend graph, as available. To compile data from multiple indicators for one or more states, build a [Custom State Report](https://www.kff.org/statedata/custom/).

This page lists the disability-related indicators within the Health Status category of KFF State Health Facts. Each indicator links to a state-by-state data table (all 50 states plus DC) drawn primarily from the U.S. Census Bureau American Community Survey (ACS). Two disability sub-topics are provided: disability among the total population, and disability among adults ages 19–64.
